class.name: VisionServer
class.brief_description: Singleton server coordinating all platform camera configurations and image capture operations.
class.description:
VisionServer manages raw camera feeds (OpenCV or platform-specific drivers) using an RID-based resource model. It provides double-buffered frame texture cache queries to GDScript client nodes and supports virtual camera injection.
NOTE: The implementation of VisionServer is split across three platform layers:src/godot/vision_server.cpp : Handles generic ClassDB binding, lifecycle, RID registration, and virtual cameras.src/native/vision_server.cpp : Implements native OpenCV camera capture and frame grabbing.src/web/vision_server.cpp : Implements Web HTML5 JS/Emscripten canvas capture callbacks.
src/godot/vision_server.cpp : Handles generic ClassDB binding, lifecycle, RID registration, and virtual cameras.
src/native/vision_server.cpp : Implements native OpenCV camera capture and frame grabbing.
src/web/vision_server.cpp : Implements Web HTML5 JS/Emscripten canvas capture callbacks.

method.name: camera_create
method.description: Create a new camera resource and return its unique RID.

method.name: camera_set_device_id
method.description: Set the hardware device ID index to capture from.

method.name: camera_set_focal_length
method.description: Set camera lens focal length parameter.

method.name: camera_get_focal_length
method.description: Get the camera lens focal length parameter.

method.name: camera_get_fov
method.description: Get the camera lens fov parameter.

method.name: camera_start
method.description:
Start frame capture capture on the camera.
True if started successfully, false otherwise.
True if started successfully, false otherwise.

method.name: camera_stop
method.description: Stop frame capture and release hardware resources.

method.name: get_camera_current_texture
method.description: Retrieve the latest captured frame texture for Godot rendering.

method.name: camera_get_current_image
method.description: Retrieve the latest captured CPU image resource.

method.name: get_camera_current_frame
method.description:
Retrieve the raw frame data for GazeServer or background pipeline threads.
p_camera The camera RID. r_frame Frame structure to populate. True if a new frame was grabbed successfully, false otherwise.
The camera RID.
Frame structure to populate.
True if a new frame was grabbed successfully, false otherwise.

method.name: get_singleton
method.description: Get the VisionServer global singleton instance.
